meaning: n.淤泥,残渣,煤粉,泥沙v.(使)淤塞,充塞
examples: Silt and windblown soil buried the site even deeper.
Loam is a soil with roughly equal proportions of clay, sand and silt.
The river deposited silt at its mouth.
This decree belongs where those PCBs are buried in the silt of the Hudson.
At the bottom, Mr Cameron encountered incredibly fine silt, which he had to be careful not to disturb.
